author: Greg Cording
content:
Halloumi soft 🌮 Taco's shells and a berry smoothie... Also tried spicy dirty fries. Both very yummy...

My only gripe which isn't about the nice food is the smoothies are served in plastic containers and there doesn't appear to be any recycling in the rear courtyard bins, no separation of plastics, cans, and trays with all waste mixed and emptied into the large commercial dustbin in the rear courtyard.
